items.title: Socceroos secure place in World Cup last 32 after nerve-shredding draw with Paraguay
items.summary: It was not a match of high distinction, but all the Socceroos needed was a pass against Paraguay, and their 0-0 in San Francisco Bay Area stadium booked a place in the World Cup knock-out rounds for the third time in their history. items.title: Turkey 3 USA 2: Kaan Ayhan scores dramatic winner in last kick of game to salvage World Cup pride
items.summary: MAURICIO POCHETTINO had the luxury of rolling out a lineup full of backups for his matchup against Turkey after winning Group D in just two games. items.title: Key England pair MISS training just days before World Cup clash against Panama sparking injury fears
items.summary: REECE JAMES and Declan Rice missed training ahead of England's game with Panama. The Three Lions returned to their Kansas City training base following the 0-0 draw with Ghana. items.title: Today on Sky Sports Racing: Diamond Rain bids for Newcastle double
items.summary: Racing on Friday comes from Newcastle, Doncaster, Yarmouth and Bangor - with 27 contests scheduled on a busy day of action.

items.title: England World Cup star breaks silence on Thomas Tuchel snub and talks up major tactical shift after Ghana struggles
items.summary: EBERECHI EZE trusts his time will come with England - just like it did with Arsenal. And when his moment arrives, the playmaker is ready to seize it. items.title: Group-winners USA beaten as Turkey restore pride with thrilling victory
items.summary: Eliminated Turkey scored a 98th-minute winner to clinch a 3-2 victory over World Cup co-hosts USA, who will face Bosnia-Herzegovina in the round of 32.

items.title: Australia progress with bore draw which looks set to also suit Paraguay
items.summary: Australia are into the last-32 of the World Cup and Paraguay are well placed to join them after a 0-0 draw in San Francisco which suited both sides.

items.title: From 42% to 5.26% - how Scotland's World Cup hopes are fading
items.summary: Defeat against Brazil left Scotland in a precarious position, but little has gone their way since either.

items.title: Turkey end World Cup on high with last-gasp win over USA
items.summary: Turkey come out on top in the last minute of an end-to-end 3-2 win over a second string USA side, in their final Group D match at SoFi Stadium in Los Angeles.

items.title: What each team need to reach World Cup knockouts
items.summary: With the final round of group fixtures under way the path to the World Cup final on 19 July is starting to take shape.

items.title: Brobbey on target again as Netherlands beat Tunisia to win group
items.summary: Brian Brobbey scores for the second game in a row as Netherlands defeat Tunisia 3-1 to top Group F, setting up a match against Morocco in the last 32 at the World Cup.

items.title: USA suffer late defeat to Turkey but eye Bosnia and Herzegovina in World Cup knockout stage
items.summary: The US men’s national team have already made history this summer. items.title: World Cup 2026 Group D LIVE TABLE: Latest standings as Australia pip Paraguay to last-32 spot behind USA

items.summary: GROUP F at this year's World Cup has been settled - and three out of the four teams will participate in the round of 32! items.summary: ITV'S World Cup coverage of Turkey's clash with the USA was interrupted live on air. items.title: World Cup 2026 Group E LIVE TABLE: Latest standings as Germany, Ivory Coast and Ecuador all qualify
items.summary: GROUP E has been wrapped up - and three out of the four nations will progress to the round of 32! Germany and the Ivory Coast book their spots in the next round by picking up six points each out of a possible nine. But Ecuador have snuck through via the 3rd place ranking places...
